html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D2.DT.Yellow fever decision table in the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: Client is not due for yellow fever vaccination Case 1
Client is not due for yellow fever vaccination Case 2
Client is not due for yellow fever vaccination
Client is not due for yellow fever vaccination Guidance
Client is due for yellow fever vaccination
Client is due for yellow fever vaccination Guidance
Yellow fever immunization schedule is complete
Yellow fever immunization schedule is complete Guidance
